title: Original Fence Recipe
description: This simple Data Pack adds in a recipe that allows you to make fences the old way.
body:
# Original Fence Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

The recipe was changed with the Release 1.8 update.

With 6 sticks, 3 on top and 3 on bottom will give you an oak fence. 

**Q**: What about the other fences?

**A**: This is why they changed the recipe in the first place to account for the other wood types. Back in the day you only had the one fence!

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bd542b79497f5e8cb46e724f14e7ed2017a8046.png)
